---
title: "Heart Risk Explorer"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

heart <- read.csv("heart-attack-risk-prediction-dataset.csv")
heart <- na.omit(heart)

heart$Heart.Attack.Risk..Binary. <- factor(
  heart$Heart.Attack.Risk..Binary.,
  levels = c(0, 1),
  labels = c("Low Risk", "High Risk")
)

n_total <- nrow(heart)
pct_high <- round(mean(heart$Heart.Attack.Risk..Binary. == "High Risk") * 100, 1)
